ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., discrete action space, continuous action space) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the result */,
  "perplexity" REAL /* Perplexity of the result */,
  "total_exec_time" REAL /* Total execution time of the result */,
  "max_return" REAL /* Maximum return of the result */,
  "std_return" REAL /* Standard deviation of return of the result */,
  "avg_policy_std" REAL /* Average policy standard deviation of the result */,
  "metric_units" TEXT /* Units of the metrics */,
  "result_timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the result was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the configuration belongs to */,
  "num_trajs" INTEGER /* Number of trajectories in the configuration */,
  "itr_time" REAL /* Iteration time of the configuration */,
  "max_kl" REAL /* Maximum KL divergence of the configuration */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the configuration */,
  "config_timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the configuration was set */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configurations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the version was created */,
  "parent_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_parent_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_version_id") REFERENCES experiment_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the configuration belongs to */,
  "num_trajs" INTEGER /* Number of trajectories in the configuration */,
  "itr_time" REAL /* Iteration time of the configuration */,
  "max_kl" REAL /* Maximum KL divergence of the configuration */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the configuration */,
  "config_timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the configuration was set */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_configurations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES experiment_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the result belongs to */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the result */,
  "perplexity" REAL /* Perplexity of the result */,
  "total_exec_time" REAL /* Total execution time of the result */,
  "max_return" REAL /* Maximum return of the result */,
  "std_return" REAL /* Standard deviation of return of the result */,
  "avg_policy_std" REAL /* Average policy standard deviation of the result */,
  "metric_units" TEXT /* Units of the metrics */,
  "result_timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the result was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_results_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES experiment_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "losses" (
  "loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loss */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the loss belongs to */,
  "loss_after" REAL /* Loss after the experiment */,
  "mean_kl" REAL /* Mean KL divergence of the experiment */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance of the experiment */,
  "avg_return" REAL /* Average return of the experiment */,
  "loss_before" REAL /* Loss before the experiment */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return of the experiment */,
  "loss_units" TEXT /* Units of the loss metrics */,
  "loss_timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the loss was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_losses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loss_versions" (
  "loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loss */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the loss belongs to */,
  "loss_after" REAL /* Loss after the version */,
  "mean_kl" REAL /* Mean KL divergence of the version */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance of the version */,
  "avg_return" REAL /* Average return of the version */,
  "loss_before" REAL /* Loss before the version */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return of the version */,
  "loss_units" TEXT /* Units of the loss metrics */,
  "loss_timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the loss was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loss_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES experiment_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trajectories" (
  "trajectory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trajectory */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trajectory belongs to */,
  "trajectory_data" TEXT /* Data of the trajectory */,
  "trajectory_timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the trajectory was recorded */,
  "trajectory_description" TEXT /* Description of the trajectory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trajectory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trajectories_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
